name: jsonapi4j
description: Claude Code plugin for building JSON:API backends with the jsonapi4j (pro.api4) Java framework — resources, relationships, operations, compound documents, validation, security, and testing.

plugins.name: jsonapi4j
plugins.description: How to design and build JSON:API-compliant backends with jsonapi4j (Spring Boot, Quarkus, Servlet) — resources, to-one/to-many relationships, operations, compound documents/includes, pagination, validation, access control, configuration, and RestAssured testing.
